completed.summary: Real Polytopia unit stats, costs, per-type HP, Swordsman/Knight, city level bonuses
Tech tree UI, unit gating, AI research, 150 tests
Resource tiles, buildings (Lumber Hut/Mine/Farm/Port), food/population growth
Giant super unit at city level 5, 40HP/5atk/4def
Tribe selection, map types, perfection mode, 152 tests
Healing system: units that skip their turn heal +4 HP in friendly territory, +2 in neutral/enemy
Melee advance: only melee units advance into defender's tile on kill
Binary upgrade choice system: Workshop/Explorer, City Wall/Resources, Population Growth/Border Growth, Park/Super Unit
Verify building costs/effects match GDD §5.5 — all match (Lumber Hut 3⭐, Mine 5⭐, Farm 5⭐, Port 7⭐), added verification tests
Full naval chain: RAFT/SCOUT/RAMMER/BOMBER unit types, water movement, Port embark/disembark, naval upgrades, AI naval pathfinding, 188 tests
Neutral villages: spawn at game start with proximity rules, capture by ending turn on them, becomes level-1 city, AI village targeting, 196 tests
AI heal decision — damaged units (<50% HP) within 2 tiles of friendly city skip turn to heal instead of moving toward enemies
AI tech priority: research unit-unlocking techs first when stars > 10, sorted by unlocked unit attack power; 4 new tests, all 204 passing
Verify starting stars: human 15⭐, AI 10⭐, base 5⭐/t + city production; 5 new tests, all 209 passing
Implement Escape (Rider retreats 1 tile when hit) and Persist (Knight refreshes action on kill) skills; 12 new tests; 221 total passing
Fortify gating for terrain/city defense bonuses, ×4.0 city wall bonus for fortified units, visual shield indicators, 228 tests passing
Update GDD.md implementation status markers: 10 features corrected from ❌ to ✅ including naval, healing, upgrades, villages, skills, fortify, gaps summary
Refine healing: add Wait button and keyboard shortcut for unit skip-turn healing — +4 friendly, +2 other, capped at maxHP, fortify per GDD §4.2
Melee advance already implemented at lines 475-478 and 748-751 — verified in code review
Building costs already correct in BUILDING_DEFS — Lumber Hut 3⭐, Port 7⭐, Mine 5⭐, Farm 5⭐
Starting stars already set: humanTribe.stars = 15 at line 76, AI gets 10⭐ base
Escape (lines 464-469, 737-742) and Persist (lines 479-482) already implemented

Per-type map generation: 6 distinct algorithms (Continents/Lakes/Dryland/Archipelago/Waterworld/Pangea), Waterworld+Pangea added to enum, GameScene passes mapType through, 8 new tests, 236 total passing

City border expansion: territory radius = city level (L1=1…L5=5), expanded resource collection from all tiles in radius, visual blue boundary highlights on territory edge tiles, 5 new tests, 241 total passing
Veteran system: kill tracking, +5 max HP, full heal, naval+Giant exclusion, 10 new tests, 251 total passing
Ancient ruins: size-scaled placement (4-23), ≥2 spacing from villages/cities/water, 3 reward types (veteran/free tech/stars), naval+Giant exclusion, 11 tests, 262 total passing
Siege mechanics: City.isBesieged, 0 stars when besieged, UI lock, red border indicator, 7 new tests, 269 total passing
Poison status: poisonTurns field on Unit, applyPoison() resets to 3, processPoison() 1dmg/turn, Archer attacks apply poison, GameScene.startTurn processes poison, 9 new tests, 278 total passing

Fog-of-war: per-tribe visibility via tribeVisibility Map, vision reveal from units (2 tiles, 3 for Scout/Giant) + cities, black fog on unrevealed, dimmed on explored, enemy unit culling, 10 new tests, 288 total passing

Mind Bender unit: MIND_BENDER type (0atk/1def/10HP/1mov/5⭐), PHILOSOPHY tech, Convert adjacent enemy to your tribe, Heal 4HP to adjacent friendlies, cannot convert naval+Giant, 15 new tests, 310 total passing
Cloak submerge/emerge: GameState methods, CombatSystem attack blocking, UI buttons, 7 new tests, 317 total passing
Stiff (Catapult/Giant/Bomber/Raft): no move after attack, no retaliation. Splash (Bomber): half damage to adjacent enemies. 12 new tests, 327 total passing
Battle preview on hover: predicted attack/counter-attack damage in info bar, 💀 on guaranteed kill, ⚠️ on lethal counter-attack, 6 new tests, 333 total passing
AI attack priority: sort adjacent enemies by ascending HP, descending attack for ties. Knight Persist chain respects sort order. 4 new tests, 337 total passing

Autonomous Explorer pathfinding: BFS fog-reveal scoring (110 optimal, 173 suboptimal), distance penalty, anti-backtracking, 15-step cap. Spawns SCOUT at L2 Explorer choice. 7 new tests, 344 total passing

Trade routes, city connections, Grand Bazaar: roads (3⭐), bridges (5⭐), BFS connection detection, +1 pop per connection, Grand Bazaar at 5+ connections (+3 pop, +400 score), 16 new tests, 366 total passing
Resource proximity constraint: enforceResourceProximity() strips resources >2 tiles from any city/village, 3 new tests, 369 total passing

Scout 5×5 vision reveal on disembark: when SCOUT moves from water to land, reveal hex range 2 (~5×5 area) via state.revealVision(). Only SCOUT triggers, not Raft/Rammer/Bomber. 3 new tests, 372 total passing
Fog retaliation suppression: attacker not visible to defender's tribe → no counter-attack. Optional GameState param in executeAttack. 4 new tests, 375 total passing

Extended tech tree: 6 new techs (Climbing/Organization/Farming/Smithery/Aquaculture/Strategy), fixed Swordsman→Smithery, Rammer→Aquaculture, Defender→Strategy gates, dynamic tech tree UI, 384 total tests passing
Complete Polaris tribe: Gaami super unit (gated by Polar Warfare, spawns at L5), Ice Bank Polaris-only, GAAMI added to trainable units, 4 new tests (400 total)

Complete Cymanti tribe: Centipede/Hexapods/Doomux units, Fungiculture/Mycelium/Hydrology/Venom techs, Fungi Farm/Mycelium Network/Algae Bridge buildings, Venom ×0.7 defense penalty, 15 new tests (415 total)

Complete Elyrion tribe: Egg/Baby Dragon/Fire Dragon/Polytaur units, Ecology/Draconic/Prophecy techs, Sanctuary building, Enchantment action, Dragon maturation chain, Prophetic Vision ruins overlay, 15 new tests (430 total)

Audit GDD §9 gaps section against codebase — update 30+ incorrect [ ] markers to [x] for implemented features (Stiff, Splash, Cloak, Mind Bender, Battle preview, Fog retaliation, Naval, Border, Explorer, Trade routes, Map gen, Tech tree, Tribes). Only remaining [ ] is scoring extensions (deferred per GDD §1).

Fix GameScene.create crash: TRIBE_CONFIGS grew to 7 tribes but placeCities only allocated 4 starting positions, causing p.toString() on undefined. Added 3 more positions for Polaris/Cymanti/Elyrion. 430 tests still passing.
Buildings placed on specific resource tiles matching requiresResource. Units spawn on adjacent non-water unoccupied tiles via findSpawnPosition(). Building icons rendered on tiles. 430 tests pass.

Created scripts/deploy.sh: kills stale processes on port 3001 (was serve dist bypassing systemd), builds with npm run build, restarts systemd polytopia-clone service, verifies single process on port + HTTP 200. Idempotent. 430 tests pass.

Fix tech panel text overlap: filter tribe-specific series for non-matching tribes (7 series for base, 8 for tribal), split into 2 rows when >5 series so each column is ≥120px (was 60px). Panel height adapts dynamically. 430 tests pass.
Fix city menu scroll drift: add setScrollFactor(0) to text objects in showCityMenu() so the menu stays at its computed screen position instead of drifting when camera scrolls. 430 tests pass.

Implement Cloak Infiltration per GDD §3.5: Dagger unit (3HP/2atk/1def/1mov), primedForInfiltrate tracking, Infiltrate action consumes Cloak + schedules Dagger spawn next turn, requires Diplomacy tech, 14 new tests (444 total passing)

Mark Park scoring as [x] in GDD.md §9. Changed [ ] to [x] with confirmation note. Verified calcScore() has parkScore (hasPark = +250/city). Confirmed 4 remaining [ ] items (Territorial/Exploration/Monument/Temple scoring) are genuinely deferred per GDD §1. All 444 tests pass. Deployed + live 200.

Add Grand Bazaar +400 score to calcScore(). Extract scoring logic into pure computeTribeScore() in ScoreCalculator.ts so testable without Phaser. 2 new tests verify grand bazaar stacking and zero contribution. 446 tests pass. Deployed + live 200.
Fix level score formula per GDD §1.2: (c.level-1)*50 → L1=0, L2=50, L3=100, L4=150, L5=200. 6 new tests verify each level. 452 tests pass. Deployed + live 200.

Fix Playwright testDir collision: changed from ./tests (vitest dir) to ./tests-e2e (actual e2e tests). Existing smoke test in game.test.ts verifies canvas renders. 452 vitest tests pass. Config-only change — no deploy needed.
Split Phaser into separate vendor chunk via manualChunks, raised chunkSizeWarningLimit to 2000KB. Build: 2 chunks (phaser-*.js 1.4MB + index-*.js 80KB), no warning. 452 tests pass. Live HTTP 200.
Add sound toggle button to HUD with localStorage persistence. Mute/unmute (🔊/🔇) at top-right, toggles this.sound.mute, persists in localStorage.
Move mute button from (740,10) to (10,10) to eliminate ~22px overlap with end turn button at (660,10). Left side of HUD was empty — clean separation.

spec_gaps.evidence: Resolved by fix-deploy-stale-process-cleanup (19fdd45). Systemd polytopia-clone service now uses vite preview on port 3001 (PID 2312947). deploy.sh kills stale processes before restart. No ExecStartPre yet in systemd service file — fix-deploy-systemd-execstartpre task remains as hardening.

spec_gaps.item: Sound toggle overlaps end turn button
spec_gaps.evidence: Muted button moved from (740,10) to (10,10) in c97b590. No overlap.

coach_review.notes: fix-mute-button-overlap (c97b590): APPROVED. Moved muteBtn from (740,10) to (10,10) — 650px away from end turn button at (660,10). Clean separation, left side was empty. Security: no new deps/endpoints. YAGNI: only required fix, no scope creep. Perf: N/A (frontend coordinate change). Tests: 452/452 pass (coach-verified). Live site: HTTP 200, 0 console errors, canvas renders (tribe selection screen). Spec gap 'sound toggle overlap' marked fixed. Backlog: ⚠️ 1 remaining (fix-deploy-systemd-execstartpre). Infrastructure: stale PID 2122063 is gone; systemd service is now managing vite preview on port 3001 (PID 2312947). Fix-deploy-stale-process-cleanup (19fdd45) resolved the immediate stale process issue. ExecStartPre task remains as hardening.
